---
title: "add_panel_labels"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L1852)

# `add_panel_labels()`

Add panel labels to a patchwork plot

## Usage

```r
add_panel_labels(
  plot,
  labels = NULL,
  style = "upper",
  fontface = "bold",
  size = 14,
  x = 0,
  y = 1,
  hjust = -0.1,
  vjust = 1.1
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `plot` | a patchwork plot object |
| `labels` | character vector of labels. Default: uppercase letters matching the number of panels. |
| `style` | one of "upper" (A, B, C), "lower" (a, b, c), or "custom" (use labels as-is). Default: "upper". |
| `fontface` | font face for labels. Default: "bold". |
| `size` | text size in pts. Default: 14. |
| `x` | x position of label within each panel. Default: 0. |
| `y` | y position of label within each panel. Default: 1. |
| `hjust` | horizontal justification. Default: -0.1. |
| `vjust` | vertical justification. Default: 1.1. |

## Value

patchwork plot with annotation labels

## Description

Adds letter labels (e.g. "A", "B", "C") to each panel of a patchwork
composite plot.
